prediction.reasoning: The prediction is based on a log-normal random walk model, utilizing estimated historical annualized volatility and drift for AVGO. We assumed an annualized volatility of 35% and an annualized average return (drift) of 12%, based on typical behavior of large-cap tech stocks. The point estimate represents the median of the predicted log-normal distribution for the price in 3 trading days. The confidence intervals are calculated by determining the corresponding Z-scores for each confidence level and applying them to the standard deviation of log returns over the 3-day period, derived from the assumed annualized volatility.
